title: schoenorchis buddleiflora
intro: Schoenorchis buddleiflora, also known as the "Asian Shoal-water Orchid", is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Schoenorchis buddleiflora include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an anti-aging agent. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in tea form or as an extract, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
